prompt: Create a realistic lifestyle product photograph of a calm morning coffee scene on a gray concrete kitchen countertop. In the foreground, place exactly 3 white ceramic coffee items: 1 plain white mug on the left filled with black coffee, 1 taller off-white speckled ceramic mug on the right, and 1 white ceramic pour-over dripper sitting on top of the taller mug. The dripper contains a tan paper filter with dark coffee grounds and brewed coffee visible, with thin wisps of steam rising upward. Use a white ceramic pour-over dripper on an off-white mug beside a white coffee mug as the central subject. The scene should feel minimalist, cozy, and natural, with soft diffused daylight coming from a window on the right. In the background, include exactly 5 supporting objects: 2 wooden cutting boards leaning against a gray wall on the left, 1 matte black kettle behind the left mug, 1 small white ceramic jar with a brown lid near the cutting boards, and 1 beige potted green plant by the bright window on the right. Add 1 folded dark gray cloth napkin at the bottom-right edge of the counter. Use a muted neutral color palette of warm whites, stone gray, beige, natural wood, matte black, and leafy green. Set the environment in a minimal modern kitchen with concrete surfaces. Shoot at eye-level with a slight front angle, shallow depth of field, realistic shadows, soft background blur, no people, no text, no logos, no extra cups or objects. Make it look like a premium editorial coffee advertisement photographed with natural light, crisp focus on the cups and dripper, subtle steam, and a serene quiet atmosphere.
